{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Truegold scales
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] possesses ten scales that radiate the power of a [[Truegold]] and are stamped with the crest of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
